items.title: SOL reclaims $72, but onchain data flags weakening momentum
items.whyYouShouldCare: SOL's recovery to $72 is notable, but declining on-chain metrics suggest potential challenges for sustained upward momentum.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE jumps 8.9%, leading index higher
items.whyYouShouldCare: AAVE's 8.9% surge contributes positively to the broader market, indicating increased investor interest that could spill over into SOL's ecosystem.

items.title: Jito hits $1.75B revenue milestone, but what does this mean for its price rally?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's $1.75B revenue achievement highlights its growing influence, which may enhance its utility and indirectly support SOL's ecosystem expansion.
